THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOK, YEUK-HAI $4,320.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,320.00, COSTS PER COST BILL.
